digest: 过去 30 天，共追踪到 22 个热门 AI 开源项目（主力语言：Python, Rust, TypeScript）和 12 篇最新 ArXiv 论文。GitHub 最热方向是「应用与前端」。

categories.name: 🧩 Agent 技能与工具
categories.desc: 把工程、产品、设计能力封装成可复用的 Skill / 工具模块

repos.name: mattpocock/skills
repos.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .agents directory.
repos.summary_zh: 从.agents目录提取真实工程师技能。

repos.name: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
repos.description: 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.
repos.summary_zh: 百多个可运行、可定制的AI代理与RAG应用集合。

repos.name: github/spec-kit
repos.description: 💫 Toolkit to help you get started with Spec-Driven Development
repos.summary_zh: 帮助开发者快速启动规范驱动开发的工具包。

repos.name: openai/codex
repos.description: Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal
repos.summary_zh: 终端内轻量级编码智能体。

categories.name: 🔍 信息搜索与抓取
categories.desc: 主动抓取社区、社媒、网页、GitHub 等外部信号

repos.name: moeru-ai/airi
repos.description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's
repos.summary_zh: 自托管AI伴侣，支持实时语音聊天与Minecraft交互。

repos.name: DioxusLabs/dioxus
repos.description: Fullstack app framework for web, desktop, and mobile.
repos.summary_zh: 跨平台全栈应用框架，支持Web、桌面与移动端。

repos.name: firecrawl/open-lovable
repos.description: 🔥 Clone and recreate any website as a modern React app in seconds
repos.summary_zh: 一键克隆任意网站为现代React应用。

repos.name: stalwartlabs/stalwart
repos.description: All-in-one Mail & Collaboration server. Secure, scalable and fluent in every protocol (IMAP, JMAP, SMTP, CalDAV, CardDAV, WebDAV).
repos.summary_zh: 一体化的安全可扩展邮件与协作服务器，支持全协议。

categories.name: 🧠 上下文与推理基础设施
categories.desc: 压缩、转换、整理输入，降低 Token 成本，加速推理

repos.name: upstash/context7
repos.description: Context7 Platform -- Up-to-date code documentation for LLMs and AI code editors
repos.summary_zh: 为LLM和AI编辑器提供实时更新的代码文档。

repos.name: kvcache-ai/ktransformers
repos.description: A Flexible Framework for Experiencing Heterogeneous LLM Inference/Fine-tune Optimizations
repos.summary_zh: 异构LLM推理与微调优化的灵活框架。

repos.name: jmerelnyc/Talos
repos.description: GPU worker client for the Talos network. Pairs with your Talos account, serves open-model inference jobs over a WebSocket, and reports uptime for payo
repos.summary_zh: 为Talos网络提供GPU算力，运行开源模型推理并赚取报酬。

repos.name: usedotai/dot-loom
repos.description: Provider-pluggable orchestration runtime for multi-model AI inference. ( Sakana Fugu style )
repos.summary_zh: 多模型AI推理的可插拔编排运行时。

categories.name: 🔬 模型训练与微调
categories.desc: 预训练、微调、对齐、评估等模型构建环节

repos.name: thinking-machines-lab/tinker-cookbook
repos.description: Post-training with Tinker
repos.summary_zh: 基于Tinker框架进行模型后训练的工具集合。

repos.name: Y0oshi/Text-LLM-Training-from-scratch
repos.description: A from-scratch implementation of the language-model training pipeline in PyTorch: tokenization, pretraining, SFT, and preference-based alignment.
repos.summary_zh: 从零实现PyTorch语言模型训练全流程：分词、预训练、微调与偏好对齐。

categories.name: 🎨 应用与前端
categories.desc: 面向终端用户的 AI 应用、UI 组件、聊天界面

repos.name: codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x
repos.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.
repos.summary_zh: 用代码从零复现经典技术来掌握编程。

repos.name: nilbuild/developer-roadmap
repos.description: Interactive roadmaps, guides and other educational content to help developers grow in their careers.
repos.summary_zh: 开发者成长路线图与交互式学习指南。

repos.name: atuinsh/atuin
repos.description: ✨ Making your shell magical
repos.summary_zh: 用Rust实现的shell历史记录同步与搜索工具。

repos.name: emilk/egui
repos.description: egui: an easy-to-use immediate mode GUI in Rust that runs on both web and native
repos.summary_zh: Rust即时模式GUI库，支持Web与原生应用开发。

categories.name: 📦 其他热门
categories.desc: 值得关注的其他 AI/ML 开源项目

repos.name: astral-sh/uv
repos.description: An extremely fast Python package and project manager, written in Rust.
repos.summary_zh: 极速Python包与项目管理工具，基于Rust开发。

repos.name: zed-industries/zed
repos.description: Code at the speed of thought – Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter.
repos.summary_zh: 高性能多人协作代码编辑器，由Atom和Tree-sitter团队打造。

repos.name: OpenCut-app/OpenCut
repos.description: The open-source CapCut alternative
repos.summary_zh: 开源版CapCut，提供视频剪辑与导出功能。

repos.name: virattt/ai-hedge-fund
repos.description: An AI Hedge Fund Team
repos.summary_zh: AI对冲基金团队，用Python实现智能投资决策。

papers.title: Logical Judgments Under Pressure: Diagnosing Syllogistic Stability with Learned Soft Prefixes
papers.abstract: To test how correct logical judgments respond to learned context, we prepend a soft prefix to an exactly labeled syllogistic reasoning benchmark while keeping the model fixed. Soft prefixes are opaque
papers.summary_zh: 通过可学习的软前缀扰动三段论推理基准，揭示逻辑判断在上下文压力下的稳定性。

papers.title: GigaPath-Flash and GigaTIME-Flash: Efficient Pathology Foundation Models for Whole-Slide and Tumor Microenvironment Analysis
papers.abstract: Foundation models have emerged as a driving force in computational pathology, with the potential to transform cancer diagnosis, prognosis, and treatment selection by learning transferable representati
papers.summary_zh: 提出GigaPath-Flash和GigaTIME-Flash，实现全切片与肿瘤微环境分析的高效病理基础模型。

papers.title: SWE-Pruner Pro: The Coder LLM Already Knows What to Prune
papers.abstract: Pruning long context for coding agents has been a vital technology for efficient context management. While existing context pruning methods such as SWE-Pruner realize this by attaching a separate code
papers.summary_zh: 发现编码器LLM自身已编码代码相关性，无需额外分类器即可高效剪枝长上下文。

papers.title: It's Not What You Say, It's How You Say It: Evaluating LLM Responses to Expressions of Belief
papers.abstract: Users frequently express their beliefs to large language models (LLMs). In some situations, the LLM should accept these contextual beliefs as true. In others, they should stick to their prior knowledg
papers.summary_zh: 提出评估LLM对用户信念表达（EoBs）的框架，强调回应需区分语言形式与事实真伪。

papers.title: Vector Search As Nearest Neighbor Matching: RAG-based Policy Learning in Causal Inference
papers.abstract: We propose one-step and two-step methods for policy learning with retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). We formulate RAG-based action selection under the potential outcome framework. In the two-step m
papers.summary_zh: 提出基于RAG的因果推断策略学习方法，将向量搜索视为最近邻匹配，实现一步和两步策略学习。

papers.title: Automated Discovery Has No Universally Superior Harness
papers.abstract: Autonomous discovery systems such as OpenEvolve and TTT-Discover are often used as general-purpose harnesses. However, in practice these are composite systems combining several design choices about ar
papers.summary_zh: 自动发现系统无通用最优框架，其性能高度依赖具体设计选择组合。

papers.title: The Many Senses of Visual Similarity: A Text-Prompted Image Perceptual Metric
papers.abstract: Human visual similarity judgments are context-dependent. For example, two images may be similar in shape but distinct in color. Existing perceptual similarity metrics, however, collapse these nuances
papers.summary_zh: 提出文本引导的图像感知度量，使相似性判断可依据指定属性（如形状或颜色）进行条件化。

papers.title: Patch Policy: Efficient Embodied Control via Dense Visual Representations
papers.abstract: Pretrained dense visual features from Vision Transformers (ViTs) are powerful yet have been underutilized in robot learning. Modern robot policies either compress each observation into a single global
papers.summary_zh: 提出基于ViT密集视觉特征的机器人控制策略，保留细粒度空间信息，提升学习效率与性能。

papers.title: Simple Domain Generalization for Strong Pixel-Level Image Tampering Detection in Modern VLMs
papers.abstract: Modern vision-language models (VLMs) have significantly improved image generation and editing capabilities, making pixel-level image tampering detection increasingly important yet challenging under cr
papers.summary_zh: 提出一种简单域泛化方法，显著提升现代视觉语言模型在跨模型与分布外场景下的像素级篡改检测性能。

papers.title: Causal Discovery on Irregular Time Series
papers.abstract: Causal discovery methods have shown strong performance in temporal systems, but they typically rely on regular and discrete lag structures, limiting their applicability to regularly sampled data. Howe
papers.summary_zh: 提出一种适用于不规则时间序列的因果发现方法，突破传统对规则采样数据的依赖。

papers.title: Unveiling Invariant and Transferable Latent Factors Across Heterogeneous Environments via ATLAS
papers.abstract: This paper considers a multi-environment factor model in which high-dimensional covariates are collected from heterogeneous environments, with auxiliary labels available in a subset of these environme
papers.summary_zh: 提出ATLAS方法，从异构环境高维数据中提取跨环境不变且可迁移的潜在因子。

papers.title: VEHBench: A Stage-Local Diagnostic Benchmark for LLM-Assisted Vibration Energy Harvester Design
papers.abstract: Battery-free Internet of Things (IoT) requires iterative design of vibration energy harvesters (VEHs) under coupled physical constraints, while LLMs are emerging as interface layers for engineering wo
papers.summary_zh: VEHBench提出分阶段诊断基准，评估LLM辅助振动能量采集器设计各环节的耦合约束处理能力。
